form.label: Smartbus Indexer Balance
form.description: Shows whether Smartbus work is evenly distributed across indexers over time.

search.query: index=_internal source=*metrics.log group=smartbus queue_name="$queue_filter$" | timechart span=5m sum(event_count) as events by host limit=20
index=_internal source=*metrics.log group=smartbus queue_name="$queue_filter$" | eval raw_gb=raw_size_bytes/1024/1024/1024 | timechart span=5m sum(raw_gb) as raw_gb by host limit=20

index=_internal source=*metrics.log group=smartbus queue_name="$queue_filter$" | bin _time span=5m | stats sum(event_count) as events by _time host | eventstats avg(events) as avg_events stdev(events) as stdev_events by _time | eval imbalance_pct=if(avg_events>0,round((stdev_events/avg_events)*100,2),0) | timechart span=5m avg(imbalance_pct) as imbalance_pct

index=_internal source=*metrics.log group=smartbus queue_name="$queue_filter$" | stats sum(successful_message_count) as successful_messages sum(failed_message_count) as failed_messages sum(event_count) as events sum(raw_size_bytes) as raw_bytes avg(total_time_ms) as avg_total_ms max(total_time_ms) as max_total_ms by host queue_name name | eval raw_gb=round(raw_bytes/1024/1024/1024,2) | eval avg_total_ms=round(avg_total_ms,2) | eval max_total_ms=round(max_total_ms,2) | fillnull value=0 successful_messages failed_messages events raw_gb avg_total_ms max_total_ms | sort - events
